calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-02-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Cohen for petitioner Helen Hart (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary.

Mr. Cohen described circumstances surrounding execution of the will and the inability to locate the original following the decedent's death. No objections were raised to the instant petition.

Following discussion, the Court found that the presumption of revocation had been overcome and admitted the lost will dated April 22, 2020. Helen Hart was appointed as the executor with limited authority and bond was set at $290,000. Michael Kasolas was appointed as probate referee. The Court set a status hearing for filing a petition for final distribution or a report on status of administration on August 2, 2027, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
